original: The slick new uniform your Dad issued a while back. Sexy, form-fitting, and utilitarian. Doesn’t provide much protection (or modesty, for that matter), but it’s got a built-in shield emitter to boost your shields. Note that it isn’t strong enough to generate a defensive shield on its own.
